physical_notes: USDA soybean meal is a strict USDA target and has been unit-aligned to USD_PER_SHORT_TON against ZS futures converted from USD_PER_BUSHEL; product mismatch remains, so this is a related proxy, not strict soybean basis.

physical_conversion_formula: no_conversion_needed; USDA soybean meal physical is already USD_PER_SHORT_TON
conversion_note: Unit-converted related proxy: soybean meal physical is compared against soybean futures converted to USD_PER_SHORT_TON. This is not a strict soybean cash basis because physical leg is soybean meal, not raw soybeans.
